response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows systems (only brief C/C++ exposure in early career) and has no domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets. While the resume demonstrates strong technical versatility across multiple languages and platforms, it does not align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No significant C++ experience on Windows platform (only early C/C++ exposure)
No domain experience in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets
Primary expertise in web/mobile development rather than systems programming
